description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to enemies within range 2 times. The first hit knocks enemies down for [1.8 sec->1.5sec]. This skill applies Defense Penetration 800 higher.
Removes all harmful effects from all allies and increases their Attack, Attack Speed by [36%->10%], and Physical Defense for [6 sec->8sec].

Charges forward and deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies 12 times. While casting, the caster is immune to status effects. The final hit freezes enemies for [2.4 sec->2sec] and increases Physical DMG taken by [(added) 16%] for [(added) 10sec].

Every second, Attack increases, Status Resistance by [30->10], and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by [1.5%->1%]. This effect stacks up to 20 times. [(removed) At 20 or more stacks, Normal Attack damage increases by 100%.]

light.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [2 sec->3 sec].

description.unified: [Vortex] increases DMG by [{0}%->{0}%], and its last hit increases the P.DMG the target takes by [{0}%->{1}%] for 10 sec.
[Enrage] Changes the max number of stacks to [30->40] and upon gaining 30 stacks, increases own DEF Penetration by {0}.

dark.unified: Recovers HP every second equal to 10% of ATK, and for every 1% HP lost, all damage taken is reduced by [0.6%->0.5%].

description.unified: Max HP increases by {0}%, and Normal Attacks have a 15% chance to deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power and freeze the target for [2 sec->1 sec].
